text:
```yaml infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-config
data:
  SFTPGO_FTPD__LISTEN_PORT: "21"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__DRIVER: "postgresql"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__NAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__HOST: "db-sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__USERNAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: "sftpgociw8sWECsfgdd29fH2nwhkB"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__POOL_SIZE: "10"
  SFTPGO_HTTPD__BRANDING__NAME: "eGreen FTP server"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-secret
type: Opaque
data:
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: c2Z0cGdvY2l3OHNXRUNzZmdkZDI5Zkgybndoa0I= # Base64-encoded value
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sftpgo
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 21
      targetPort: 21
      protocol: TCP
      name: ftp
  selector:
    app: sftpgo
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: sftpgo
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: sftpgo
  serviceName: "sftpgo"
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: sftpgo
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: sftpgo
          image: drakkan/sftpgo:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 21
              name: ftp
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
              name: sftpgo-config
            - secretRef:
              name: sftpgo-secret
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: db-sftpgo
  serviceName: "db-sftpgo"
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: postgres
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: postgres:16
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: sftpgo-secret
                  key: SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD
          volumeMounts:
            - name: postgres-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: db-sftpgo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
      name: postgres
  selector:
    app: db-sftpgo
```

Add swervice for acceding web ui for admin and client

Here is the XML patch to add a service for accessing the web UI for both admin and client.

```xml
<patch>
<title>Add service for web UI access</title>

<edit>
<path>infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml</path>
<description>Add a new service for accessing the web UI for admin and client.</description>
<operation>insert_after</operation>
<old_text>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: db-sftpgo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
      name: postgres
  selector:
    app: db-sftpgo
</old_text>
<new_text>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-web-ui
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
      name: web-ui
  selector:
    app: sftpgo
</new_text>
</edit>

<edit>
<path>infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml</path>
<description>Expose the web UI port in the SFTPGo StatefulSet for admin and client access.</description>
<operation>update</operation>
<old_text>
          ports:
            - containerPort: 21
              name: ftp
</old_text>
<new_text>
          ports:
            - containerPort: 21
              name: ftp
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: web-ui
</new_text>
</edit>
</patch>
```
```yaml infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-config
data:
  SFTPGO_FTPD__LISTEN_PORT: "21"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__DRIVER: "postgresql"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__NAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__HOST: "db-sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__USERNAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: "sftpgociw8sWECsfgdd29fH2nwhkB"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__POOL_SIZE: "10"
  SFTPGO_HTTPD__BRANDING__NAME: "eGreen FTP server"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-secret
type: Opaque
data:
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: c2Z0cGdvY2l3OHNXRUNzZmdkZDI5Zkgybndoa0I= # Base64-encoded value
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sftpgo
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 21
      targetPort: 21
      protocol: TCP
      name: ftp
  selector:
    app: sftpgo
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: sftpgo
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: sftpgo
  serviceName: "sftpgo"
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: sftpgo
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: sftpgo
          image: drakkan/sftpgo:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 21
              name: ftp
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: web-ui
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
              name: sftpgo-config
            - secretRef:
              name: sftpgo-secret
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: postgres
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: db-sftpgo
  serviceName: "db-sftpgo"
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: postgres
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: postgres:16
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: sftpgo-secret
                  key: SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD
          volumeMounts:
            - name: postgres-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: db-sftpgo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
      name: postgres
  selector:
    app: db-sftpgo
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-web-ui
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
      name: web-ui
  selector:
    app: sftpgo
```

```yaml infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ingress-routes.yaml
################################################################################
# Sdata
################################################################################
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: sdata
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - web
  routes:
    - match: Host(`sdata.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      middlewares:
        - name: redirect-https
      priority: 1
      services:
        - name: sdata
          port: 80
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: sdata-tls
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - websecure
  routes:
    - match: Host(`sdata.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      priority: 1
      services:
        - name: sdata
          port: 80
  tls:
    secretName: sdata-tls

---
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
  name: sdata.k8-test.egreen.fr
spec:
  dnsNames:
    - sdata.k8-test.egreen.fr
  secretName: sdata-tls
  issuerRef:
    name: letsencrypt-prod # Use the issuer created previously
    kind: ClusterIssuer

################################################################################
# Backend (api)
################################################################################
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - web
  routes:
    - match: Host(`app.k8-test.egreen.fr`) && (PathPrefix(`/api`) || PathPrefix(`/admin`) || PathPrefix(`/static`) || PathPrefix(`/media`) || PathPrefix(`/sso`) )
      kind: Rule
      services:
        - name: backend
          port: 8000
      middlewares:
        - name: redirect-https

---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-tls
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - websecure
  routes:
    - match: Host(`app.k8-test.egreen.fr`) && (PathPrefix(`/api`) || PathPrefix(`/admin`) || PathPrefix(`/static`) || PathPrefix(`/media`) || PathPrefix(`/sso`) )
      kind: Rule
      services:
        - name: backend
          port: 8000
  tls:
    secretName: app-egreen-tls

################################################################################
# Backend (celery)
################################################################################
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: celery-basicauth
  namespace: egreen
type: kubernetes.io/basic-auth
data:
  username: ZWdyZWVu # username: egreen
  password: NjJqVTk2REVMaWU2MXBPYzZYZ20= # password: 62jU96DELie61pOc6Xgm
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: celery-auth
spec:
  basicAuth:
    secret: celery-basicauth
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: celery-ui
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - web
  routes:
    - match: Host(`celery.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      priority: 1
      services:
        - name: celery-ui
          port: 5555
      middlewares:
        - name: redirect-https

---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: celery-ui-tls
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - websecure
  routes:
    - match: Host(`celery.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      priority: 1
      middlewares:
        - name: celery-auth
      services:
        - name: celery-ui
          port: 5555
  tls:
    secretName: celery-egreen-tls

---
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
  name: celery.k8-test.egreen.fr
spec:
  dnsNames:
    - celery.k8-test.egreen.fr
  secretName: celery-egreen-tls
  issuerRef:
    name: letsencrypt-prod # Use the issuer created previously
    kind: ClusterIssuer

################################################################################
# Frontend
################################################################################
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - web
  routes:
    - match: Host(`app.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      middlewares:
        - name: redirect-https
      services:
        - name: frontend
          port: 80
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: frontend-tls
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - websecure
  routes:
    - match: Host(`app.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      services:
        - name: frontend
          port: 80
  tls:
    secretName: app-egreen-tls

---
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
  name: app.k8-test.egreen.fr
spec:
  dnsNames:
    - app.k8-test.egreen.fr
  secretName: app-egreen-tls
  issuerRef:
    name: letsencrypt-prod # Use the issuer created previously
    kind: ClusterIssuer

################################################################################
# TV
################################################################################
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: tv
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - web
  routes:
    - match: Host(`tv.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      middlewares:
        - name: redirect-https
      services:
        - name: tv
          port: 80
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: tv-tls
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - websecure
  routes:
    - match: Host(`tv.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      services:
        - name: tv
          port: 80
  tls:
    secretName: tv-egreen-tls

---
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
  name: tv.k8-test.egreen.fr
spec:
  dnsNames:
    - tv.k8-test.egreen.fr
  secretName: tv-egreen-tls
  issuerRef:
    name: letsencrypt-prod # Use the issuer created previously
    kind: ClusterIssuer
```

Add ingress route and certificate for acceding web ui
To add an ingress route and certificate for accessing the SFTPGo web UI, you can extend the `ingress-routes.yaml` file with the following configuration:

```yaml
################################################################################
# SFTPGo Web UI
################################################################################
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-web-ui
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - web
  routes:
    - match: Host(`sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      middlewares:
        - name: redirect-https
      services:
        - name: sftpgo-web-ui
          port: 8080
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-web-ui-tls
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - websecure
  routes:
    - match: Host(`sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      services:
        - name: sftpgo-web-ui
          port: 8080
  tls:
    secretName: sftpgo-web-ui-tls

---
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
  name: sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr
spec:
  dnsNames:
    - sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr
  secretName: sftpgo-web-ui-tls
  issuerRef:
    name: letsencrypt-prod # Use the issuer created previously
    kind: ClusterIssuer
```

### Explanation of the Configuration:
1. **IngressRoute for HTTP (`sftpgo-web-ui`)**:
   - This route matches requests to `sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr` on the `web` entry point (HTTP).
   - It redirects HTTP traffic to HTTPS using the `redirect-https` middleware.
   - The service `sftpgo-web-ui` is exposed on port `8080`.

2. **IngressRoute for HTTPS (`sftpgo-web-ui-tls`)**:
   - This route matches requests to `sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr` on the `websecure` entry point (HTTPS).
   - It uses the `sftpgo-web-ui` service on port `8080`.
   - TLS is enabled using the `sftpgo-web-ui-tls` secret.

3. **Certificate (`sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr`)**:
   - A certificate is created for the domain `sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr`.
   - The certificate is stored in the `sftpgo-web-ui-tls` secret.
   - The `letsencrypt-prod` ClusterIssuer is used to issue the certificate.

### Steps to Apply:
1. Save the updated `ingress-routes.yaml` file.
2. Apply the changes to your Kubernetes cluster:
   ```bash
   kubectl apply -f ingress-routes.yaml
   ```
3. Verify that the ingress routes and certificate are created successfully:
   ```bash
   kubectl get ingressroute -n egreen
   kubectl get certificate -n egreen
   ```
4. Access the SFTPGo web UI at `https://sftpgo.k8-test.egreen.fr`.

This configuration ensures that the SFTPGo web UI is accessible over HTTPS with a valid TLS certificate.
